get_forecast.name: Get forecast
get_forecast.description: Return the current 15-minute and hourly forecast curves for one or all configured sites.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Restrict the response to a single config entry. Omit to return every configured site.

user.title: Set up Balcony Solar Forecast
user.description: Set the name, location and update intervals. The "Site configuration" field is pre-filled with the full operator setup (8 modules, horizon tables, inverter groups) — just confirm it for the reference site, or edit it freely. Azimuth: 0° = North, clockwise (90° = East, 180° = South). Tilt: degrees from horizontal (90° = vertical).

data_description.name: Unique name for this installation — one instance per name.
data_description.fetch_interval_seconds: How often Open-Meteo is polled (default 1800 = 30 min).
data_description.recompute_interval_seconds: How often the forecast is recomputed (default 900 = 15 min).

error.site_not_object: The site configuration must be an object.
error.site_malformed: The site configuration is invalid or incomplete.
error.no_planes: At least one plane must be defined.
error.bad_azimuth: Azimuth must be between 0 and 360 degrees (0 = North).
error.bad_tilt: Tilt must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
error.bad_wp: Module power (Wp) must be greater than 0.
error.bad_horizon_azimuth: Horizon azimuth must be between 0 and 360 degrees.
error.bad_horizon_elevation: Horizon elevation must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
error.seasonal_missing_tau: Seasonal horizon rows need tau_leafed and tau_bare.
error.group_no_name: Every inverter group needs a name.
error.group_no_planes: Every group must contain at least one plane.
error.group_unknown_plane: A group references an unknown plane.
error.bad_ac_limit: The AC limit must be greater than 0.

abort.already_configured: An installation with this name already exists.

init.title: Edit Balcony Solar Forecast
init.description: Adjust the location, intervals and the full site configuration. The name is immutable after setup.
